raspberry cordial kill stomach bugs contaminated water?
Have ever used cordial prevent gastro bugs?
Have your messageboard below.
most cordial shopping list; avoid because it's full sugar, teeth some artificial colourings make some kids hyperactive.
raspberry cordial some very loyal fans, don't necessarily enjoy sweet taste.
These people keep pantry because they swear prevent possibly treat stomach bugs.
they right, says microbiologist Heather Cavanagh, whose research found some raspberry juice blackcurrant juice cordials kill least different types nasty bacteria responsible stomach bugs, including Coli several strains salmonella.
Cavanagh first became interested raspberry cordial preventative treatment stomach bugs when heard that some farmers parts South Wales Victoria were adding raspberry cordial their livestock's drinking water treat diarrhoea.
also began hear stories other people using raspberry cordial treat stomach bugs: heard anecdotal reports from away Queensland Western Australia, heard people used treat themselves their family.
just their animals".
decided there science support these anecdotal reports.
lab, Cavanagh tested juice made from number fresh berries including raspberries, blackberries, blackcurrants, cranberries, mulberries, loganberries boysenberries well commercially available cordials made from these berries (these cordials were made with real berry juice, apple juice artificial colours sometimes case).
These juices cordials were then diluted down with water different strengths, strongest part water five parts cordial weakest 1:100.
Then each type bacteria mixed with each berry drinks.
researchers found number raspberry blackcurrant juice cordials killed most bacteria.
while there been some speculation that it's sugar content cordials that kills bacteria, Cavanagh says there something unique raspberry blackcurrant juices, which seems responsible.
Those cordials that best antibacterial properties contained least cent raspberry blackcurrant juice, worked when diluted down part cordial parts water.
Undiluted raspberry juice blackcurrant juice worked just well cordials.
But, Cavanagh says, there's hitch.
While research suggests there's some truth cordial story, there haven't been clinical trials testing whether raspberry cordial prevent treat stomach bugs humans animals.
know certain that adding right amount these cordials water will reduce number bacteria water," says.
"[But] cannot certain that cordial will definitely prevent stomach bugs people, don't know will help treatment already feeling sick.
Although again there some anecdotal evidence suggest that might."
even cordial does work, stomach bugs (gastroenteritis) caused range things other than bacteria such viruses, parasites, certain medications raspberry cordial won't help these cases.
Also careful about drinking much cordial (even diluted 1:10 ratio) have vomiting diarrhoea.
Drinks with high sugar content such undiluted soft drinks, sports drinks, juices strong cordials promote fluid loss into bowel worsen dehydration, which risk anyone with vomiting diarrhoea.
Heather Cavanagh senior lecturer microbiology School Biomedical Sciences Charles Sturt University.

Cheating investors unscrupulous companies takes many forms, such 'vanishing' after raising money through public offers; illegal collection deposits violation Section Companies Act, 1956; floating sham 'Collective Investment Schemes (CIS)' violation SEBI Act; collecting money from public posing 'Non-Banking Financial Companies (NBFCs) violation Act; resorting 'Ponzy' money circulation schemes under Prize Chits Money Circulation Schemes (Banning) Act, 1978.
Securities Exchange Board India (SEBI) also looked into affairs companies whose operations were violation SEBI (Collective Investment Schemes) Regulations, 1999. amount collected these companies about 7,435 crore.
these companies, have been wound money refunded investors.
total companies were prosecuted; convictions have been secured cases.
also regulates deposits investments public with Non- banking Finance Companies (NBFC) that registered with RBI.
Complaints received against companies posing NBFC's Unincorporated bodies indulging cheating fraud forwarded Economic Offenses Wing State Police investigation further action.
There certain companies which have floated fraudulent investment deposits mobilizing schemes (also called ponzi schemes) under various guises liable action under Prize Chits Money Circulation Schemes (Banning) Act, 1978.
This administered Ministry Finance (Department Financial Services) through State Governments.

Memorandum, NIELIT will state-of-art Forensic within premises SFIO with total outlay 3.80 Crore turnkey basis, completed phases.
MoUs signed with FIU-IND will lead better faster exchange information between three Government entities.
been playing pivotal role collection dissemination information suspicious banking transactions under Prevention Money Laundering Act, 2002.

Having access banking information well expertise FIU, will help SFIO conducting investigation more effective manner.
These initiatives will facilitate development comprehensive detection fraud malfeasance earliest.
concerned regulatory agencies Central Government have adopted different measures aimed sensitizing public need cautious while making investments into schemes, etc.

Valentino Clemente Ludovico Garavani best known Valentino, Italian fashion designer born 1932 founder Valentino brand company.
main lines include Valentino, Valentino Garavani, Valentino Roma, R.E.D.
Valentino.
became interested fashion while primary school moved Paris pursue this interest.
studied École Beaux-Arts Chambre Syndicale Couture Parisienne.
first choice apprenticeship, Paris, Jacques Fath, then Balenciaga.
then joined Laroche years.
became well know even 1960 1964 Mrs. Kennedy ordered Valentino haute couture dresses, black white, wore them during year mourning following President John Kennedy's assassination.
From then devoted client would become friend.
